Back to the game

Privacy policy

This page explains what information Brikaya uses, why it is used, and how you control it.

Last updated: 2026-07-07

Play How to play FAQ About Legal Privacy Terms Data deletion Support

No player account

This version of Brikaya does not require a player account, sign-in, or profile to play.

Scores, preferences, language choices, consent choices, and local game records are stored on your device.

Approximate region and language

Brikaya may suggest language or region settings from browser information or a broad time zone. This is used to make the game easier to start.

You can change the language and review region consent in the game menu.

Ads and consent

If ads are available, they may use consent choices and browser signals required by advertising rules.

Ads must be optional for the game experience and must not remove access to play.

Contact and rights

For privacy questions or requests, contact contato@brikaya.com. Include the page or device context needed to understand the request.
